name: Klaviyo CRM draft watcher

klaviyo_objects.template_name: LK Phase 5 P1 Curadoria Loja Física 2026-05-11
klaviyo_objects.campaign_name: LK Phase 5 P1 Curadoria Loja Física 2026-05-11, DRAFT

checks.name: list_get_readonly
checks.detail: Klaviyo list can be read by ID.

evidence.list_name: LK Phase 5 P1 Loja Física Recompra 2026-05-11

checks.name: template_get_readonly
checks.detail: Klaviyo template can be read by ID; warn only because the campaign can still exist without template linked via API.

evidence.template_name: LK Phase 5 P1 Curadoria Loja Física 2026-05-11

checks.name: campaign_get_readonly
checks.detail: Klaviyo campaign can be read by ID.

evidence.campaign_name: LK Phase 5 P1 Curadoria Loja Física 2026-05-11, DRAFT

checks.name: campaign_not_archived
checks.detail: Campaign should not be archived if Lucas needs to inspect the draft.

checks.name: no_raw_pii_output
checks.detail: Report uses only counts and Klaviyo object IDs; no customer emails/names are emitted.

checks.name: no_deep_link_guessed
checks.detail: No Klaviyo UI deep link is generated; use verified IDs/names only.

checks.name: send_schedule_mutations_blocked
checks.detail: Script only uses GET endpoints and does not call campaign send/schedule/update/create endpoints.

guardrails: No campaign/list/template mutation executed by this watcher.
No raw PII emitted into Brain or Telegram.
No unverified Klaviyo deep link generated.
next_gate: Lucas can review verified IDs/names and decide adjust, pause, or explicitly approve a separate send packet. This watcher itself must not send.
